risk_statement: Third-party payment API may impose rate limits affecting transaction throughput
mitigation: Implement request queuing and caching layer
review_notes: Rate limit tests passed. Monitoring dashboard active.

risk_statement: Key developer going on extended leave during critical sprint
review_notes: Knowledge transfer completed. Backup developer briefed.

risk_statement: Client may request scope changes after UAT demos
mitigation: Clear scope baseline documented and signed off
contingency: Change request process with impact assessment required
review_notes: Scope baseline v3.1 approved. Client review scheduled 2026-06-25.

risk_statement: Database migration may cause data loss during production cutover
mitigation: Full backup and rollback plan tested in staging
contingency: Restore from point-in-time backup, estimated 2hr downtime
review_notes: Migration tested twice in staging. Zero data loss confirmed.
